title: n8n Docker: Import workflows to container
body: docker cp {{workflows.json}} {{container-name}}:/tmp/workflows.json && docker exec -u node -it {{container-name}} n8n import:workflow --input=/tmp/workflows.json
description: Copy workflow file to container and import - two-step process for Docker environments (community.n8n.io/t/importing-workflows-and-credentials/45142)
